title: pelargonium × coarctatum
intro: Pelargonium × coarctatum, also known as the Cape Geranium or the Scented Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its small, white flowers and distinctive fragrance. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, due to its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × coarctatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as colds and flu, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × coarctatum, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
